projects.title: Library Management System
projects.description: Design and populate a database for a library, implementing queries to track book checkouts, overdue items, and member statistics.

projects.title: E-commerce Analytics Dashboard
projects.description: Analyze a large retail dataset to generate business reports on customer lifetime value, popular product categories, and monthly revenue growth.

projects.title: University Enrollment Schema
projects.description: Build a robust database schema for a university, handling complex relationships between students, courses, professors, and grades.
